# Semantic CFG lifecycle benchmark — 2026-07-20

This is the durable decision record for Milestone 5 of
`.agents/plans/all-language-cfg-icfg-rollout.md`. Times are milliseconds. Each
array contains the seven retained fresh-process samples from rounds 2 through
8, in round order, rounded to six decimal places. The reported median is the
middle value after sorting, not the fourth chronological sample.

## Provenance and method

- Bifrost base commit: `22f0399e0e3e8a8c807ee0139c914a0682d2d1b0`.
- Sample-time dirty-tree fingerprints: layout `51f56a7632816380eb9641b325c86f052081d1e5e12e24717c304d8618f0a8de`; persistence `b01593015742a8633c424779281063b255c49174e324f0d73a9dbb11f4deb96a`.
- Aggregate-v5 recommendation tree: `8d6d9018d339ed7dc65d46062ab0a247bded96e6f5001260ea3207d35dda16f7`. Aggregate v5 records this separately from sample identity and from each dataset repository.
- Runtime: Rust 1.96.0 (`ac68faa20`), release profile, macOS/aarch64, Apple M4, 10 logical CPUs, 64-bit little endian.
- External corpora: VS Code `19e0f9e681ecb8e5c09d8784acaa601316ca4571` and Spring PetClinic `f182358d02e4a68e52bdbabf55ca7800288511e7`, both clean.
- Each layout or storage mode ran in nine fresh processes. Rounds 0 and 1 were discarded; seven samples were retained. Mode order rotated across rounds.
- VS Code exposed 5,633 analyzable files; 5,625 materialized. Seven parse-safety rejections and one owned-text budget rejection remain in the measured partial status. Spring PetClinic materialized all 49 files.
- `hydrate` used a primed sequential read. `hydrate_cold` used macOS `F_GLOBAL_NOCACHE`. Retained-byte values exclude allocator-private metadata. Peak RSS is the process high-water mark.

## Layout samples

The fields below are `freeze`, full `forward`, full `reverse`, and estimated
retained bytes. Corpus-backed rows additionally include `semantic` parse/lower
plus validation and `repeat` materialization. `m=` records the median in the
same field order.

## Persistence samples

The `operation` array is rebuild, build-plus-write, warm hydrate, or forced-cold
hydrate according to the row. `repeat` is the second semantic materialization
sweep and applies only to modes that build. Size fields are median bytes:
packed payload, SQLite database, estimated hydrated DTO, and peak RSS.

## Gate and decision

| Corpus | Hydration speedup | Saved | RSS | Packed size | Relative write | Absolute write | Result |
| --- | ---: | ---: | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| VS Code | 99.1588% | 24,407.083 ms | pass | pass | pass | **fail**: 1,275.685 ms > 250 ms | fail |
| Spring PetClinic | 98.6492% | 57.427 ms | pass | pass | pass | pass | pass |

All external corpora had to pass every predeclared gate. Therefore the decision
is `no_go`: do not add production SQLite persistence for the current optimistic
control/call semantic projection. Retain immutable byte-bounded in-memory
artifacts, generation-local ICFG stitching, and ephemeral bounded snapshots.
This decision does not cover later value-flow, solver, or reusable-summary
artifacts, which require their own #817 measurements.
